mapper.sql: select a.activity_id, a.title, a.cover_image, a.summary, a.content, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.signup_deadline, a.location, a.quota, a.sort_order, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, (select count(1) from t_offline_activity_signup s where s.activity_id = a.activity_id and s.status in (0, 2)) as signup_count from t_offline_activity a
mapper.select:
and a.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%') and a.status = #{status} and a.location like concat('%', #{location}, '%')
order by a.sort_order asc, a.start_time asc, a.activity_id desc

select a.activity_id, a.title, a.cover_image, a.summary, a.content, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.signup_deadline, a.location, a.quota, a.sort_order, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, (select count(1) from t_offline_activity_signup s where s.activity_id = a.activity_id and s.status in (0, 2)) as signup_count, us.status as current_user_signup_status, us.signup_id as current_user_signup_id from t_offline_activity a left join t_offline_activity_signup us on us.activity_id = a.activity_id and us.user_id = #{userId} and us.status in (0, 2, 3) where a.status = 1 and (a.end_time is null or a.end_time >= now()) order by a.sort_order asc, a.start_time asc, a.activity_id desc

select a.activity_id, a.title, a.cover_image, a.summary, a.content, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.signup_deadline, a.location, a.quota, a.sort_order, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, (select count(1) from t_offline_activity_signup s where s.activity_id = a.activity_id and s.status in (0, 2)) as signup_count, us.status as current_user_signup_status, us.signup_id as current_user_signup_id from t_offline_activity a left join t_offline_activity_signup us on us.activity_id = a.activity_id and us.user_id = #{userId} and us.status in (0, 2, 3) where a.activity_id = #{activityId} and a.status = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into t_offline_activity
title, cover_image, summary, content, start_time, end_time, signup_deadline, location, quota, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{title}, #{coverImage}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{signupDeadline}, #{location}, #{quota}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_offline_activity where activity_id in
#{activityId}
